calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Dismissal on file.

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PAK WON'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs IS Granted. No opposition was filed. The Court order reasonable attorney's fees in the amount of $6210.00 and costs in the amount of $483.95 to be paid to plaintiff. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Susan Crozier CSR 4761.
